title: Payload Mapper Source Manifest
description: Frozen source manifest for all vendor docs and public datasets used in the payload mapper dataset pack

sources.label: Ashby ATS Connector Docs
sources.notes: Candidate IDs may change after deduplication; application IDs are safer for progression tracking

sources.label: Custom Fields Feature Docs
sources.notes: custom_fields is a JSON object; values may be strings, numbers, objects, or arrays; aliases map remote names to unified keys

sources.label: Create Employee / Smart Field Mapping Docs
sources.notes: Smart field mapping uses unified keys; operators can self-serve field alignment

sources.label: Greenhouse ATS API
sources.notes: Public Harvest API; job IDs are stable; stage IDs are per-pipeline

sources.label: Open Apply Jobs Dataset
sources.notes: Daily full snapshot of active public postings from Ashby, Greenhouse, Lever; not an event stream

sources.label: Downstream Webhook Delivery Docs
sources.notes: Webhook docs provide product rationale; not a direct mapping data source
